task.action: Redesign layout for Fire Section, Domestic Trips, and International Trips using a specific grid-aligned slider. The layout must offset 180px for a sidebar area and place 4 cards of 277.5px width with 16px gaps. Ensure cards have a 1:1 aspect ratio (square frame).
task.result_summary: Redesigned Fire Section, Domestic Trips, and International Trips to use a 180px sidebar + Swiper layout. Fire cards: 277.5px × 277.5px (1:1 aspect ratio). Trip cards: 277.5px wide, aspect-ratio:1 image frame. spaceBetween: 16px on all three swipers. Layout classes: .fire-section-layout/.fire-sidebar/.fire-ticker-area and .ht-section-layout/.ht-sidebar/.ht-swiper-area. Responsive: stacks vertically on ≤640px.
